example: This tutorial will teach you how to create animations.
We will create 2D character animations.
Add voiceover to your video project.
On the dashboard, select the options to create a new project.
The workspace is in the center of the interface.
Several scenes come together to form a video.
Use the timeline to control animation duration.
The library contains characters, music, and other elements.
Add a background to the scene.
Add a kid character that is walking.
Select among 500 different actions for the character.
Adjust the purple bar to control visibility of the character.
Use SmartMove to move the character between two points.
zh: 智慧移動（動畫功能名稱）

example: Create a custom character using the MyCharacter section.
ja: カスタムキャラクター

example: Change the facial features of your character.
Customize the attire of the character.
Add wearables to enhance your character's look.
Use the action plus option to add multiple actions.
Use text to speech to generate voiceover.
You can control the pitch of the voice.
Add pause effects between words.
Paid users can use auto-enhanced feature to improve voice quality.
Open the camera timeline to add camera effects.
Select dynamic camera for camera effects.
Add a music track to the audio timeline.
ja: ミュージックトラック

example: Adjust the volume of the music track.
Select publish to download the video.
